heading: ADMINISTRATIVE PROCEDURE
label: II ADMINISTRATIVE PROCEDURE
notes: Short TitleThe provisions of this subchapter and chapter 7 of this title were originally enacted by , , popularly known as the “Administrative Procedure Act”. That Act was repealed as part of the general revision of this title by and its provisions incorporated into this subchapter and chapter 7 hereof.act June 11, 1946, ch. 32460 Stat. 237Pub. L. 89–554
